_note: PLACEHOLDER - replace with Kartik's real preferences (see BLOCKED.md). This is the master style overlay applied across all platforms before platform-specific prefs (linkedin_prefs.json / youtube_prefs.json / instagram_prefs.json).
tone: direct, first-principles, no fluff. Conversational but sharp. Sounds like Karthik, not a brand.
structure: hook -> context/insight -> takeaway or CTA. Short paragraphs, no walls of text.

hashtags.style: specific to topic + niche, no generic spam tags (no #motivation #success)

emoji: minimal - 1 to 2 max, only if it adds clarity, never decorative

linkedin.structure: strong hook -> 3-4 short paragraphs -> question or CTA

youtube.tone: high energy, educational, like a smart friend explaining

instagram.structure: hook line -> value -> CTA; carousel slides for depth
